config.network: A vs B, 6 IPD + 6 reconstructed-curve studies, literal FP power 0 (log t)
config.note: Reconstructed studies carry a late-growing reconstruction bias + variance (the Sec 4i least-identified-late finding). naive ses ignore r(t) (equal weight -> biased late points pull the WLS FP fit); honest ses = sqrt(sampling^2 + r(t)^2) down-weight them (Sec 5b w = 1/(var+delta^2)).
